title: AI资本军备竞赛：从芯片战争到生态绑定，谁在为未来买单？
title_en: The AI Capital Arms Race: From Chip Wars to Ecosystem Binding, Who Is Paying for the Future?
summary: 7月22日，AMD 50亿美元投资Anthropic、签署数百亿AI服务器协议，标志着AI芯片市场从产品竞争全面升级为资本驱动的生态绑定。同日，谷歌Gemini三连发、英伟达Vera CPU挑战数据中心格局、白宫Genesis Mission扩至50亿美元——AI竞赛正以前所未有的速度从技术能力比拼转向资本密集型生态战争。本文深度解析这一结构性转变，以及它对全球AI产业格局的深远影响。
summary_en: On July 22, AMD B investment in Anthropic with a multi-billion dollar AI server deal marks the transition from product competition to capital-driven ecosystem binding in the AI chip market. Same day: Google Gemini triple launch, Nvidia Vera CPU, White House B+ Genesis Mission — AI competition is accelerating from technology capability contests to capital-intensive ecosystem warfare. This article provides deep analysis of this structural transformation.
